headline: 10% Yields, Hated Stocks: 2 High-Risk Bets I'm Eyeing For Big Upside
summary: Blue Owl Capital Inc. and Conagra Brands, Inc. offer ~10% yields at discounted valuations. Read more on OWL and CAG and see why I like these stocks.
